product_overview: RideOn is a mobile-first car-pooling app (with an admin web entry) that lets drivers publish seats and passengers search & book rides using a Supabase backend and map-based search. The app supports onboarding, real-time chat, document verification and admin moderation on a single Flutter codebase.
core_goals: Provide a simple free-tier-compatible car-pooling experience (publish rides, search rides, book seats) using Supabase.
Protect safety and trust via document verification, SOS alerts and an admin moderation panel.
Deliver real-time interactions (chat, bookings, notifications) and a map-first mobile UX using open routing/geocoding services.
Keep a clean architecture: one screen per file, services for business logic, Riverpod for state and proper realtime subscription lifecycle handling.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email + password signup/login with optional phone OTP verification using Supabase Auth. Drives access to onboarding and the main app.
user_flows: Navigate to /welcome -> Navigate to /signup -> Fill in full name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit signup form -> See /profile-setup
Navigate to /welcome -> Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> If credentials valid see /home or /profile-setup depending on setup state
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See error message 'Invalid credentials' when credentials are wrong
Navigate to /signup -> Enter phone number for OTP -> Send OTP -> Navigate to /otp -> Enter OTP code -> Verify OTP -> See /profile-setup on success
Navigate to /otp -> Enter OTP code -> Verify OTP -> See error message 'Invalid or expired code' on failed verification

features.name: Profile Onboarding
features.description: Multi-step onboarding that captures personal info and optional vehicle details; marks user as setup_complete before entering the main app.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile-setup -> Fill full name -> Enter phone number -> Upload profile photo -> Submit personal info -> Navigate to /vehicle-setup
Navigate to /vehicle-setup -> Enter vehicle model -> Enter vehicle color -> Enter license plate -> Save vehicle info -> setup_complete set to true -> See /home
Navigate to /profile-setup -> Leave required fields empty -> Submit form -> See validation errors preventing progress
Navigate to /vehicle-setup -> Skip vehicle setup -> Confirm skip -> setup_complete set to true -> See /home (passenger-only flow)

features.name: Home Map Screen
features.description: Map-based home with user location, nearby ride markers, quick actions for search, publish, SOS and road reports.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> See map with current location marker
Navigate to /home -> Tap search affordance -> Navigate to /search
Navigate to /home -> Long press SOS control -> Confirm 'Send SOS' -> Trigger SOS alert and see local confirmation
Navigate to /home -> Tap my-location control -> Map centers on current GPS location
Navigate to /home -> Start road report flow -> Submit report -> See 'Report submitted' confirmation

features.name: Ride Search
features.description: Search rides by source, destination and date with autocomplete; view results and open ride details for booking.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Type source location with autocomplete -> Type destination location with autocomplete -> Select date from calendar -> Submit search -> See list of ride cards
Navigate to /search -> Perform search -> Tap a ride card -> Navigate to /ride-details/:id
Navigate to /search -> Type incomplete or mismatched locations -> Submit search -> See empty state 'No rides found' with suggested actions

features.name: Ride Details & Booking
features.description: Show ride and driver information, allow passengers to select seats and book using a transactional RPC to avoid race conditions.
user_flows: Navigate to /ride-details/:id -> See driver info and ride details including available seats and price
Navigate to /ride-details/:id -> Select seats count -> Confirm total price -> Submit booking -> On success navigate to /my-bookings and see booking confirmed
Navigate to /ride-details/:id -> Select seats more than available -> Attempt to book -> See error 'Not enough seats available'

features.name: Publish Ride
features.description: Driver flow to publish a ride in a 3-step form: route selection, trip configuration (date/time/seats/price) and ride rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /publish -> Enter from and to locations with map picker -> Fetch routes -> Select a route option
Navigate to /publish -> Set date, time, seats and price -> Toggle ride rules -> Submit publish form -> On success navigate to /my-rides and see 'Ride published' confirmation
Navigate to /publish -> Leave required fields empty or invalid date/time -> Submit publish form -> See validation errors and prevent publish

features.name: My Bookings
features.description: Passengers can view upcoming and past bookings, open booking details, chat with driver and cancel bookings (with validation and reason).
user_flows: Navigate to /my-bookings -> See upcoming bookings list
Navigate to /my-bookings -> Tap a booking -> Navigate to /booking-detail/:id -> See booking details and driver info
Navigate to /booking-detail/:id -> Choose to cancel and provide a reason -> Confirm cancel -> See booking updated to 'cancelled' and available seats restored
Navigate to /my-bookings -> Attempt to cancel a booking within restricted window (e.g., <2 hours) -> See error 'Cannot cancel booking this close to departure'

features.name: My Rides (Driver)
features.description: Drivers can manage their published rides, view passengers for a ride and cancel or edit future rides.
user_flows: Navigate to /my-rides -> See active published rides list
Navigate to /my-rides -> Tap a ride -> Navigate to /ride-passengers/:id -> View passenger list and actions
Navigate to /ride-passengers/:id -> Cancel ride -> Confirm cancellation -> See ride status 'cancelled' and passenger notifications sent
Navigate to /my-rides -> Attempt to edit a ride that is in the past -> See error 'Cannot edit past rides'

features.name: Real-time Chat
features.description: In-app real-time messaging between driver and passenger using Supabase Realtime streams with delivery status and auto-scroll.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat/:chatId -> See message history streaming in real-time
Navigate to /chat/:chatId -> Type and send a message -> Message appears in stream and auto-scrolls to bottom
Navigate to /chat/:chatId -> Attempt to send an empty message -> See validation error 'Message cannot be empty'

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: View and edit user profile and vehicle info, upload profile photo, and sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> See profile stats, vehicle info and verification status
Navigate to /profile -> Navigate to /edit-profile -> Update name or photo -> Save changes -> See updated profile on /profile
Navigate to /edit-profile -> Upload a file larger than allowed -> Attempt save -> See upload error and guidance for allowed size/types

features.name: Document Verification
features.description: Upload driving license (front/back) and vehicle RC to request admin verification; status updates (not_submitted/pending/approved/rejected) are visible to the user.
user_flows: Navigate to /documents -> Upload driving license front photo -> Upload driving license back photo -> Upload vehicle RC photo -> Submit for verification -> See status 'pending'
Navigate to /documents -> Upload unsupported file type or too-large file -> See error 'Invalid file type' or 'File too large'
Navigate to /documents -> After submission, see doc_verification_status update to 'approved' or 'rejected' once admin acts

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Real-time in-app notification feed backed by Supabase notifications table with read/unread state and actions to clear or mark as read.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> See real-time list of notifications with unread badge counts
Navigate to /notifications -> Tap a notification -> Notification marked as read -> Unread count decreases
Navigate to /notifications -> Attempt to clear all while offline -> See error 'Unable to update notifications'

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Web-accessible admin area (same codebase) for stats, user management, document verification, SOS monitoring and ride moderation; admin access required.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> If current user is admin, see dashboard stats and panels for users, documents, SOS and rides
Navigate to /admin/documents -> Open a pending document -> Approve document -> See users table doc_verification_status set to 'approved' and notification created for the user
Navigate to /admin/sos -> See active SOS alerts in real-time -> Resolve an alert -> Alert marked resolved and removed from active list
Navigate to /admin -> If current user is not admin -> See redirect to /home or access denied and cannot access admin actions

routes.description: Splash screen with logo and auto-redirect
Welcome screen with Sign Up and Login options
Home screen with map, search bar, user location
Search rides by from, to, date
Ride detail view with booking option
Booking detail with driver info, chat, cancel
Passenger list for a ride with actions
Real-time chat between driver and passenger
User profile with stats, vehicle info, menu
Edit profile form (name, phone, bio, vehicle)
Admin ride management with force cancel

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email signup/login with OTP phone verification via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Tap Shuru Karein to go to signup
Tap Login Karein to go to login
Fill email and password to sign up
Fill email and password to login

features.name: Profile Onboarding
features.description: Multi-step onboarding for profile and vehicle setup
user_interactions: Fill full name and phone number
Enter vehicle model, color, plate, type
Skip vehicle setup if passenger only

features.name: Home Map Screen
features.description: Map-based home with user location marker and search bar
user_interactions: Tap search bar to go to ride search
Tap profile avatar to go to profile
Tap notification bell to see notifications
Tap my location button for GPS centering

features.name: Ride Search
features.description: Search for rides by source, destination, and date with location autocomplete
user_interactions: View ride cards with driver info, price, seats
Tap a ride card to see ride details
Book a ride with seat count and total price

features.name: Publish Ride
features.description: 3-step ride publishing with route, trip config, and rule preferences
user_interactions: Enter from and to locations with map picker
Toggle ride rules (no smoking, no pets, etc.)

features.name: My Bookings
features.description: Passenger booking management with upcoming/past tabs

features.name: My Rides (Driver)
features.description: Driver ride management with edit, duplicate, and passenger views

features.name: Real-time Chat
features.description: In-app messaging between driver and passenger via Supabase Realtime
user_interactions: Tap a chat to open conversation

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: View and edit user profile, vehicle info, stats

features.name: Document Verification
features.description: Upload driving license and RC for admin verification

features.name: Notifications
features.description: In-app notification feed with read/unread status
user_interactions: Tap notification to mark as read

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin panel with user management, doc verification, SOS monitoring, ride management
user_interactions: View dashboard stats (total users, active rides, SOS alerts)

known_limitations.issue: OneSignal App ID is placeholder - needs real ID for push notifications
known_limitations.impact: Push notifications won't work until real OneSignal ID is configured

known_limitations.issue: Admin panel accessible only via direct URL /admin, no UI link from main app
known_limitations.impact: Admin must navigate manually to /admin route
